title: StopPoint
description: An abstract or scheduled point in a public transport network at which passengers can board or alight from a service.

stopPointId.description: Unique identifier for the stop point

publicCode.description: Publicly visible code displayed at the stop

stopAreaRef.description: Reference to the stop area this point belongs to

id.description: Unique identifier for the fulfillment stop

instructions.description: Instructions for passengers at this stop

time.description: Expected time window at this stop
